Application No. D-21 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For fresh case. For orders on office objection at Flag 'A' For orders on M.A No.9242022 (Ex) For orders on M.A No.92512022 (Limitation) For hearing of main case. Mr. Zulifqar AliJatoi, Additional Prosecutor General. None present. Same position was on last two dates of hearing. lt is now 11.00 a.m. Apparently applicant is no more interested. This Revision Application is at initial stage, the same is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. JUDGE DGE lrtAn/PA 03.08.2023. l. 2. 3. 4.
